headline: PepsiCo Stock Could Swing 4.16% After Earnings on Thursday
summary: Thursday's earnings lineup includes consumer names like PepsiCo and WD-40, with implied moves of 4.16% and 7.83%, respectively. PepsiCo has a Buy rating and WD-40 a Buy consensus rating.

raw.headline: PepsiCo Stock Could Swing 4.16% After Earnings on Thursday

headline: Oil prices heat up as US-Iran ceasefire ends: What it means for consumers
summary: Oil prices (CL=F, BZ=F) are spiking again after President Trump said that the US-Iran ceasefire is "over." WTI crude has crossed back above $70 per barrel while Brent crude re-approaches the $80 benchmark. Yahoo Finance Senior Reporters Ines Ferré and Brooke DiPalma dive into the renewed oil price pressures and what that may mean for American consumers paying for gas (RB=F) at the pump.

headline: BNP Paribas Maintains Outperform on PepsiCo, Lowers Price Target to $183

headline: Nasdaq, Dow Futures Crack After Trump Says Iran Ceasefire ‘Over’ – Why MU, SNDK, DJT, USO Are In Focus
summary: Oil prices surged on Wednesday, following resumption of hostilities between the U.S. and Iran following attacks on oil tankers in the Strait of Hormuz.

headline: Morning Call Sheet: Markets weigh oil, sector rotation and buying opportunities
summary: tephanie Link, Chief Investment Strategist at Hightower, Jay Woods, Chief Market Strategist at Freedom Capital Markets, and Kevin Gordon, Head of Macro Research at Charles Schwab, discussed oil, inflation, sector rotation, earnings and opportunities in beaten down tech stocks.
